message:
fix(fr-protocol): prevent arithmetic overflow in read_line

Replace `start + MAX_LINE_LENGTH` with `start.saturating_add(MAX_LINE_LENGTH)`
in the RESP line parser to prevent potential panic on integer overflow when
`start` is near `usize::MAX`. This hardens the parser against malformed or
adversarial input that could trigger an overflow in debug builds or wrap
silently in release builds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
